question_text: What is your favorite clothing brand?
How often do you purchase clothing from your favorite brand? (e.g., weekly, monthly, yearly)
What factors influence your choice of clothing brand? (e.g., price, quality, style, ethics)
How satisfied are you with the quality of clothing from your favorite brand?
How would you rate the customer service of your favorite clothing brand?
Are you more inclined to purchase clothing from established brands or emerging brands?
Do you think clothing brands adequately represent diversity and inclusion in their marketing?
How important is sustainability when choosing a clothing brand?
Have you ever stopped purchasing from a clothing brand due to a negative experience? If so, what was the reason?
Would you recommend your favorite clothing brand to a friend or family member?
